title: Plan with Claude Opus, Build with Kimi K2.6? LIVE Mixed-Provider Benchmark
summary: Cole Medin tested a mixed-provider workflow combining Claude Opus for planning and Kimi K2.6 for implementation using the Archon benchmarking tool. He evaluated four different provider allocation strategies across three GitHub issues on seven quality dimensions to determine the optimal configuration.
